creator: brad@brad-x.com
text:
Just realized this wasn't going to the PR list. :( I have a spare box to
test linux-base-7 on. If it works, will you be able to close this PR?

Brad

// -- http://www.BRAD-X.com/ -- //

On Sat, 24 Nov 2001, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:

> On Sat, Nov 24, 2001 at 02:42:34PM -0500, Brad Laue wrote:
> > Linux-base-7 breaks everything even after symlinking requisite libraries
> > for some programs - I don't use it.
> >
> > Brad
> >
> What is everything?  Staroffice52 works great for me and
> linux-netscape just needs a symlink.  The most important thing is to
> make sure you are running the latestl -stable to ensure you have the
> latest linuxulator code.
>
> --
> David W. Chapman Jr.
> dwcjr@inethouston.net	Raintree Network Services, Inc. <www.inethouston.net>
> dwcjr@freebsd.org	FreeBSD Committer <www.FreeBSD.org>
>
